🏋️ GymBuddy

Workout logging, set counters, and running tracking — a personal workout journal you can use right in your browser, no install needed.

Try it now →

Screenshots

How to add to your home screen

  1. Open the link above in Safari (it has to be Safari)
  2. Tap the Share button (□↑) at the bottom of the screen
  3. Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
  4. Confirm the name and tap "Add" in the top right — done!
  1. Open the link above in Chrome
  2. Tap the three-dot menu (⋮) in the top right
  3. Tap "Add to Home screen" or "Install app"
  4. Confirm the name and tap "Add" — done!

Open with QR code

Scan with your camera app to open it instantly

Send feedback

Let me know about any bugs, issues, or features you'd like to see.
You can also send feedback from the 💬 button inside the app.
